control.reason: The desired target lumen 'RB2' is not visible in the current camera view, so the student needs guidance on how to re-locate it. Use 'L1_CARINA' as the main landmark anchor.
control.soft_prompt: the student is currently at RB1, the next lumen to be explored is "RB2", and to reach there the student has to go through "RB2" first. the current curriculum mode is reorient. use "L1_CARINA" as the anchor landmark. recognition cue: carina bifurcation; symmetric main bronchi rationale: Known target exists, but current orientation is uncertain; reset and re-anchor first. recommended micro-steps: Action: Re-anchor at Landmark 1 (carina) and reset to neutral. Check: carina centered; right and left main bronchi open symmetrically. | Action: Use the access orientation(s): 90° right (access right upper lobe). Check: the target view becomes stable before advancing. | Action: Identify the landmark cue: Mercedes sign / trifurcation at the right upper lobe. Check: cue persists for 1–2 seconds without drifting. the student should tilt the tip up to reach the "RB2". the following areas have been inspected: rb1. the following areas are waited to be examed: rb2, rb3, rb4, rb5, rb6, rb7, rb8, rb9, rb10, lb1+2, lb3, lb4, lb5, lb6, lb8, lb9, lb10.

recommended_angle.name: neutral
recommended_angle.definition: arm and wrist straight; suction button facing forward; steering lever centered

micro_steps: Action: Re-anchor at Landmark 1 (carina) and reset to neutral. Check: carina centered; right and left main bronchi open symmetrically.
Action: Use the access orientation(s): 90° right (access right upper lobe). Check: the target view becomes stable before advancing.
Action: Identify the landmark cue: Mercedes sign / trifurcation at the right upper lobe. Check: cue persists for 1–2 seconds without drifting.
Action: Advance into RB2 in small increments. Check: lumen stays centered; avoid scraping the wall.
plan.why: Known target exists, but current orientation is uncertain; reset and re-anchor first.
